bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.intro: Let your chatbot schedule appointments — it checks real-time availability and books right inside the conversation.

calcom.title: Cal.com
calcom.bodyConnected: Your chatbot will offer available slots and book appointments through Cal.com. Manage the calendar, event types, and reminders from Cal.com directly.
calcom.bodyDisconnected: Connect your Cal.com account so the chatbot can check availability and book appointments. Configuration lives under Settings → Integrations.

locked.title: AI Bookings
locked.oneLiner: Unlock AI Bookings with Pro and let customers schedule appointments directly through chat.

bullets.1: Real-time availability synced with your Cal.com calendar.
bullets.2: Bot collects name, email, phone, and notes — booked in under a minute.
bullets.3: Confirmation emails, reminders, and reschedule links sent automatically.

leads.title: Leads
leads.intro: Every contact your chatbot has captured — from the website widget, your connected channels (WhatsApp, Messenger, and more), and appointment bookings.

empty.title: No leads yet
empty.body: When a visitor shares an email or phone — or reaches out on a connected channel — they'll show up here.

locked.title: Lead Capture
locked.oneLiner: Capture every visitor's intent and turn conversations into qualified leads.

bullets.1: Automatically collect name, email, phone, and the question that brought them in.
bullets.2: Custom fields and routing rules so the right person gets the right lead.
bullets.3: Export leads to CSV or your CRM via webhook.

locked.title: Social Media
locked.oneLiner: Reach customers where they already are — connect every messaging channel in one inbox.

bullets.1: Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Telegram in one place.
bullets.2: AI bot answers and human handoff work across every channel.
bullets.3: Unified conversation history regardless of where the chat started.

tiktok.title: TikTok
tiktok.description: Direct-message support for TikTok Business is on our roadmap. Let us know you want it and we'll email you when it ships.

profile.title: Profile Information

rotateConfirm.title: Rotate API Key?
rotateConfirm.description: This will invalidate your current API key immediately. Any integrations using the old key will stop working. This action cannot be undone.

regenerateConfirm.title: Regenerate Webhook Secret?
regenerateConfirm.description: This will invalidate your current webhook secret immediately. You will need to update the secret in your automation workflows. This action cannot be undone.

deliveries.title: Delivery Log
deliveries.empty: No delivery logs yet. Send a test webhook to see entries here.

superAdminView.emptyState: No capabilities configured. Add one to define what the bot can do.

teamNotifications.title: Team Notifications
teamNotifications.description: Get notified when your chatbot captures leads or finishes conversations.

newLeadAlert.title: New Lead Alert
newLeadAlert.description: Notify your team when a new lead is captured via the chatbot.

conversationSummary.title: Conversation Summary
conversationSummary.description: Send a summary of each conversation to the team inbox when a session ends.

internalName.label: Internal Name

displayName.helper: Friendly name shown to tenant admins.

free.name: Free

essential.name: Essential

features.insights: AI Insights — what your bot can't answer

pro.name: Pro
pro.blurb: Add bookings, calendar integration, platform assistant.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.blurb: Three chatbots, 1-year insights history, priority support.

features.integrations: AI Business Insights: digest, correlations, sentiment (coming soon)

enterprise.title: Enterprise plan

billing.subscribedJustNow: Subscription received — waiting for Stripe to confirm. This page will update automatically.

instructions.title: Bot Instructions
instructions.description: Tell the chatbot how it should answer visitors. You can start from a template and edit it.
instructions.promptPlaceholder: Write your bot's instructions here, or pick a template above…

template.title: Bot template
template.description: The bot's prompt identity, managed by Axentrio. Pick one and optionally pin a version.
template.previewEmpty: This template adds no base instructions.

warnings.unavailable: The bound template is unavailable; using an empty base for now.
warnings.pinned: The pinned version is no longer published; using the latest instead.
warnings.missingModules: This template expects features not enabled on your plan: {{modules}}.

additionalInstructions.title: Additional instructions
additionalInstructions.description: Extra guidance layered on top of the selected template. Leave blank to use the template as-is.
additionalInstructions.placeholder: e.g. Always mention our weekend promotion.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Guardrails, handoff behavior, and response limits

greeting.label: Greeting Message
greeting.placeholder: Hi! How can I help you today?

fallback.label: Fallback Message

confidence.label: Confidence Threshold: {{value}}
confidence.helper: Below this, bot hands off to an agent

escalationKeywords.placeholder: Type a keyword and press Enter…

topicsToAvoid.label: Topics to Avoid

leaveWithInvalid.title: Leave with invalid changes?

placeholder.faq:
Q: How long does shipping take?
A: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days.

Q: What is your return policy?
A: You can return items within 30 days of purchase.

botTemplates.empty: No templates yet. Create one to get started.

detail.availabilityHint: When on, every active tenant can bind this template. When off, only granted tenants can.

header.title: Tenants
header.subtitle: Manage all tenants across the platform.

create.title: Create New Tenant
create.description: Create a new tenant organization. A Clerk organization will be created automatically.
create.adminEmailHelp: If provided, this user will be invited as the tenant admin.

tierDialog.title: Set tier (manual override)
tierDialog.descriptionAfter: . This is a manual override — it bypasses Stripe and writes a manual primary billing row. Use it for comps, sales-managed Enterprise, or refund-driven downgrades.
tierDialog.stripeWarning: if this tenant has an active Stripe subscription, this does not cancel it. Open the Stripe dashboard and cancel the subscription there to stop further charges.

disposition.title: Active Stripe subscription:
disposition.explainer: this override won't cancel it, so the customer keeps being charged on a Free plan. Choose what happens to it:
disposition.will_cancel: I have cancelled / will cancel it in the Stripe dashboard
disposition.reasonPlaceholder: Why is the subscription staying active? (required — recorded in the audit log)

rotateDialog.title: Rotate API Key
rotateDialog.description: This will invalidate the current API key immediately. Any integrations using it will break until updated with the new key.

header.title: Users
header.subtitle: Manage all users across every tenant.

users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or tenant…

promote.title: Promote to Super Admin
promote.description: Are you sure you want to promote {{name}} to Super Admin? They will gain full platform access.

demote.title: Demote from Super Admin
demote.description: Are you sure you want to demote {{name}} from Super Admin? They will lose platform-wide privileges.

deactivate.title: Deactivate User
deactivate.description: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will be removed from their Clerk organization and lose access.

reactivate.title: Reactivate User
reactivate.description: Are you sure you want to reactivate {{name}}? They will be re-invited to their Clerk organization.

delete.title: Permanently Delete User
delete.description: This will anonymize {{name}}'s data and remove them permanently. This cannot be undone.

impersonationBanner.message: You are impersonating {{tenant}} — return to your own account when finished.

faq.title: FAQ Editor
faq.subtitle: Edit the platform Help & FAQ shown to all tenants.
faq.emptyItems: No items in this section yet.
faq.pickSection: Pick a section on the left to edit its items.
faq.reservedTooltip: Reserved sections cannot be deleted because the app links to them.
faq.reservedSingletonTooltip: Reserved sections must keep at least one item.

dialog.newSectionDescription: Create a new FAQ section. The id appears in the URL (?section=…) and cannot be changed later.
dialog.editSectionDescription: Update the section title in each supported language.
dialog.itemDescription: Question and answer text per language. English is required; others fall back to English when empty.
dialog.deleteSectionDescription: This permanently removes the section "{{title}}" and all its items.

fields.idHelp: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Example: getting-started
fields.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Must be unique within the section.
fields.title: Title
fields.question: Question
fields.optionalPlaceholder: Optional — falls back to English when empty.

errors.idKebab: Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
errors.idExists: A section with this id already exists.
errors.slugKebab: Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
errors.slugExists: An item with this slug already exists in the section.

invite.title: Invite New Member
invite.errorFallback: Failed to send invite. Please try again.

deactivate.title: Deactivate this member?
deactivate.description: They will lose access to the workspace immediately. You can reactivate them later from the members list.

agentsEmpty.title: No agents yet
agentsEmpty.agents: Agents are humans who take over conversations when the AI hands off. Most teams run fine without any — add one only if you want live takeover.
agentsEmpty.shifts: Shifts let you schedule when each agent is available — add an agent first.
agentsEmpty.performance: Agent performance appears here once agents are handling handed-off conversations.

meta.pending: First analysis runs tonight — insights appear after your chats are reviewed
meta.incomplete: Insights incomplete — still analysing recent chats

card.stats: {{visitors}} customers asked without getting an answer ({{count}} conversations) · last {{ago}}

evidence.locked: Upgrade to see the conversations behind this finding

open.title: No open gaps
open.description: When several customers ask something your assistant can't answer, it shows up here.

wins.title: No wins yet
wins.description: Resolved gaps land here — fix a gap by adding the answer to your knowledge base.

locked.title: AI Insights
locked.oneLiner: See what customers ask that your assistant can't answer yet.
locked.bullet1: Topics customers keep asking about, ranked by how many asked
locked.bullet2: Fix a gap by adding the answer to your knowledge base — wins are confirmed automatically
locked.bullet3: Refreshed nightly from your real conversations

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.empty: Patterns we spot in your conversations — correlations and sentiment themes — appear here as they emerge.

digest.title: Your weekly summary

launcher.tooltipLocked: AI Platform Assistant — included with Pro

drawer.title: AI Platform Assistant
drawer.placeholder: Ask about your bot, plan, leads, or how to do anything in Axentrio…
drawer.rateLimited: You're sending too quickly — try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

welcome.title: Hi there 👋
welcome.body: Ask me about your bot, your plan, your leads, or how to do anything in Axentrio. I can answer from the documentation and look at your tenant's data — but I can't change anything for you.
examples: What plan am I on, and when does it renew?
How many leads did we capture this week?

locked.title: Unlock the AI Platform Assistant
locked.oneLiner: An in-portal AI that answers your platform questions and surfaces your tenant's data — included with Pro and Enterprise.
bullets: Ask anything about your bot, plan, leads, or integrations
Get instant answers grounded in Axentrio's documentation
See live stats — "how many leads this week?"
locked.historyNote: Your previous chats are preserved and will be available again as soon as you upgrade.

list.empty: No bots yet. Create your first bot to get started.

quota.upgradeCta: You've reached your plan's bot limit — upgrade to add more.

pause.title: Pause this bot?

delete.title: Delete this bot?
delete.description: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

embed.description: Paste this snippet into your website's HTML, just before the closing </body> tag.
